entries.title: The Stablecoin Founder Map Doesn't Match the Stablecoin Volume Map
entries.snippet: Emerging markets drive most real-world stablecoin usage, yet founder concentration and venture funding remain U.S.- and Europe-centric.

entries.title: Spanish Regulator Says No Extensions for EU Crypto Deadline as Binance Remains Unlicensed
entries.snippet: Crypto firms operating in the European Union will be forced to cease operations if they do not obtain a MiCA license by July 1.

entries.title: Binance to stop serving EU customers after failing to secure MiCA license
entries.snippet: Crypto giant Binance has told customers in the EU that it will stop providing them with services from 1 July after it failed to secure a license under the bloc’s Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation.
entries.tweet_text: @binance to stop serving EU customers after failing to secure MiCA license

entries.title: StablecoinX bets on Ethena ecosystem with Nasdaq debut on Friday
entries.snippet: USDe circulating supply has shrunk by 70% since the October bull market peak, when it topped $14 billion.

entries.title: Sharplink buys Ethereum for first time in 8 months, adding 5,000 ETH
entries.snippet: The buy came days after a group of former Ethereum Foundation researchers launched Ethlabs, a nonprofit Sharplink helped fund.

entries.title: Airwallex Focuses on Agentic Commerce as Valuation Hits $11 Billion
entries.snippet: Business payments and financial platform Airwallex has raised $320 million in new funding. entries.title: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange
entries.snippet: The Japanese financial conglomerate plans to take full control of Bitbank as it expands an ecosystem spanning crypto trading, stablecoins, tokenization and blockchain infrastructure.
entries.tweet_text: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange

entries.title: Spark migrates $150M in stablecoin to Uniswap to advance shared liquidity
entries.snippet: Spark deployed approximately $150 million across two Uniswap v4 pools on Ethereum, while its DualPool hook and Shared Liquidity Layer are planned for later phases.

entries.title: Tether-pegged USDT0 stablecoin crosses $100 billion transaction volume milestone
entries.snippet: USDT0, backed 1:1 by tethers, the largest stablecoin by market capitalization, is the third-largest holder of USDT.

entries.title: Kraken expands OTC lending through an onchain warehouse facility with Maple
entries.snippet: Maple’s lenders will provide a revolving line of funding to supply USDC liquidity for Kraken's over-the-counter borrowers.

entries.title: Alliance-backed fintech Daya raises $2.4 million to build stablecoin payment rails

entries.title: Credit unions managing $25B in assets join stablecoin infrastructure program
entries.snippet: A new pilot from Stablecore, Circuit and Curql gives participating US credit unions access to test stablecoin payments and other digital asset services.

entries.title: Binance eyes alternative EU licensing route if Greek bid fails: Report
entries.snippet: Binance reportedly plans to seek authorization in another EU jurisdiction as the MiCA deadline approaches, with unlicensed crypto firms expected to wind down activities in the bloc.

entries.title: Goldfinch wind-down raises a hard question – can DeFi RWA survive real-world debt?

entries.title: Tether-backed Oobit brings USDT to nearly 170 million users of Brazil's PIX payment network
entries.snippet: Created by Banco Central do Brasil in 2020, PIX is one of the world's most widely-adopted digital payment networks.

entries.title: Midas' mGLOBAL token tracking Fasanara's alternative debt strategy launches on Aave Horizon
entries.snippet: Holders will now be able to deposit mGLOBAL tokens on Aave Horizon to borrow USDC while retaining full exposure to the underlying strategy.

entries.title: The ECB digital euro takes step forward after winning key European Parliament vote
entries.tweet_text: The ECB digital euro takes step forward after winning key European Parliament vote

entries.title: Blockchain platform Allium raises $40 million Series B
entries.snippet: Allium, the leading blockchain data platform for enterprises, today announced it has raised $40 million in Series B funding led by Amplify Partners, with participation from existing investors Kleiner Perkins and Theory Ventures. Amplify’s David Beyer will join the Board as part of the investment.

entries.title: Standard Chartered-backed Libeara raises $14m from GSR, Kyobo Life, others for tokenization
entries.snippet: Libeara, the tokenization platform incubated by Standard Chartered’s SC Ventures, has closed a $14 million strategic funding round led by global market maker GSR. entries.title: Allfunds to expand tokenised funds to Solana
entries.snippet: Allfunds Blockchain today announced it will be expanding its distribution and accessibility of tokenized funds to Solana, a high-performance network powering internet capital markets, payments, AI agents and crypto applications.

entries.snippet: Anchorage Digital launched Monday (June 22) a new tokenized deposit infrastructure aimed at enabling banks to offer around-the-clock settlement without overhauling their existing core systems, according to a Monday press release. entries.title: Franklin Templeton launches dedicated crypto division after closing 250 Digital acquisition
entries.snippet: The new unit arrives amid rapid growth in tokenized assets, with Franklin Templeton's onchain product suite expanding from roughly $768 million to more than $2.5 billion over the past year.

entries.title: MoonPay Acquires AI Accounting Agent Maker Entendre
entries.snippet: Crypto payments company MoonPay has acquired Entendre, which makes artificial intelligence (AI) accounting agents for stablecoin firms. entries.title: BoE dilutes stablecoin rules with plan for £40bn issuer limit
entries.snippet: Proposed regulations would no longer restrict holdings by individuals and companies

entries.snippet: Blockchain company OKX has launched a joint venture with New York Stock Exchange owner Intercontinental Exchange. entries.title: Tokenized RWA market cap rises 40% to top $51 billion as industry races to define equity tokenization model
entries.snippet: Tokenized RWA market cap tops $51 billion as equity tokenization grows 130% and firms race to define the winning business model.

entries.title: Enso launches RWA app and trading for over 500 tokenized assets
entries.snippet: Enso launched access to over 500 tokenized assets and US stocks, citing a growing demand for US equity exposure among European investors.

entries.title: Bank of England drops proposed holding caps for sterling stablecoins, sets £40 billion issuance guardrail
entries.snippet: The Bank of England proposed a £40 billion systemic stablecoin issuance guardrail and revised backing assets, targeting a 2027 launch.
entries.tweet_text: Bank of England drops proposed holding caps for sterling stablecoins, sets £40 billion issuance guardrail

entries.title: Nuvion gets onboard with Visa Direct
entries.snippet: Nuvion, the AI-powered global banking and cross-border payments platform built on fiat and stablecoins for businesses & fintechs, today announced a collaboration with Visa Direct to strengthen real-time global payout capabilities for businesses operating across borders.

entries.title: Bitget enables direct US stock purchases using crypto
entries.snippet: Bitget launched Stock+, enabling crypto-funded purchases of full and fractional US stocks through regulated brokers.
